name: naacl-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for NAACL, the Annual Conference of the Nations of the Americas Chapter of the ACL: venue routing across the *ACL family, ACL Rolling Review submission and commitment mechanics, author response, Main vs Findings outcomes, camera-ready and ACL Anthology publication, multilingual and Americas-focused evidence standards, and skipped-year calendar planning. Grounded in naacl.org, the NAACL 2024/2025 calls, and ARR pages checked on 2026-07-08.
